task_completion.description: Verify the DOI was added to 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, when the item 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is selected, the right-hand metadata pane should show the DOI field exactly as '10.1002/j.1538-7305.1948.tb01338.x'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to make the changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands modifying the Zotero SQLite database directly.

integrity.description: The agent excluded the 'https://doi.org/' prefix as instructed
integrity.visual_evidence: The DOI fields in the Zotero metadata pane should only contain the raw DOI strings (e.g., starting with '10.'), with no URL prefixes.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter other metadata fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Other fields like Title, Author, and Date in the Zotero right-hand pane should remain intact and match the original paper details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following DOIs must be exactly matched to their respective papers without any URL prefix: 1) 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication': 10.1002/j.1538-7305.1948.tb01338.x, 2) 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence': 10.1093/mind/LIX.236.433, 3) 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids': 10.1038/171737a0, 4) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition': 10.1109/CVPR.2016.90, 5) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks': 10.1145/3065386.
